bridge_notice.purpose: Temporary sibling install/count bridge until generated app artifacts are promoted through publish/import/install.

capability.label: Network Inventory
capability.description: Manage devices and locations per workspace from within the Xyn runtime shell.

suggestions.name: Show Devices
suggestions.description: List devices in the current workspace.

suggestions.name: Show Locations
suggestions.description: List locations in the current workspace.

suggestions.name: Create Device
suggestions.description: Create a new device in the current workspace.

suggestions.name: Devices by Status
suggestions.description: Display a status rollup chart for devices in the current workspace.
